title: Key word alerts across entire account
excerpt:
I know how to use the Search All function to identify where key words appear across various boards in our workspace. 
But I don’t know how to set alerts that a new instance of such key words has appeared. Is there a way …

posts.author: JC_Milam (JC Milam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know how to use the Search All function to identify where key words appear across various boards in our workspace.

But I don’t know how to set alerts that a new instance of such key words has appeared. Is there a way to do that?

Alternatively, is there a way to save a key word search across an entire account/workspace and be able to revisit that search?

This would apply to all boards in our account.

posts.author: kylecordes (Kyle Cordes)
posts.cookedHtml: I realize this does not help right now… but we have an app under development that would do this for you when it is complete.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to think of a way to do it… Would the keyword be in an update or just anywhere in the item?

posts.author: JC_Milam (JC Milam)
posts.cookedHtml: OK great keep me posted and maybe I can be a beta tester.

posts.author: JC_Milam (JC Milam)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m thinking items to begin with because I know updates are hard to track compared to item names.
